name: Gail's Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 Breast of chicken, bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken in the soy sauce, ginger powder, garlic (minced), and oil for 4 hours.
2. In a wok or large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the onion and cook until softened.
4. Add the marinated chicken pieces to the pan and cook until browned.
5. Add the carrots and cook for a few minutes more.
6. Stir in 3/4 cup of chicken stock and let it simmer until the carrots and chicken are cooked through.
7. Add the snow peas, green pepper, and water chestnuts to the pan.
8. Stir in the remaining chicken stock mixed with corn starch until the sauce thickens.
9. Cook for a few more minutes over low heat.
10. Serve the stir-fry over Chinese noodles or rice.
